englishDefinitions: an object, goal, or piece of information in a story that motivates the characters but is not very important in itself
persianTranslation: چیز/هدفِ ظاهراً مهم ولی در اصل کم‌اهمیت در داستان
examples: The stolen map is a MacGuffin that drives the plot forward.
In many thrillers, the MacGuffin matters less than the chase.
The director said the briefcase was only a MacGuffin.
